title: Create-style Functional Storage
description: A texture pack that makes Functional Storage fits Create style.
body:
This texture pack makes some blocks in Functional Storage mod more Create style. 
It turns Armor Cabinet, Compacting Drawers and Storage Controllers into Vault-like blocks, and gives Fluid Drawers an old Create copper palette feel.
This pack is inspired by Moromoro's Create Style Pretty Pipes and VAULT CHEST.
